quotes: Limit focal points per section — use contrast to direct attention to the single most important element.

rules.intent: Maintain visual clarity and prevent visual clutter by focusing the user's attention on a single primary callout or element per section.
rules.rule_text: Maintain generous white space and limit focal points per section to a single primary element, using contrast to direct attention.

quotes: alternate White / Light Blue / Golden Sand / gradient section backgrounds so adjacent assembled sections don't visually merge. **[GENERAL]: section designers must declare their section's background color in the component metadata so assemblers can sequence without two identical adjacent backgrounds.**

rules.intent: Prevent adjacent sections from visually merging and ensure clear thematic division between topics.
rules.rule_text: Do not sequence identical backgrounds adjacently. Alternate White, Light Blue, Golden Sand, or gradient section backgrounds so adjacent assembled sections don't visually merge. Section designers must declare background color in metadata for assemblers.

quotes: Bold headline + simple benefit statements + patient quote is the canonical content block pattern

Bold headline + simple benefit statements + patient quote is the canonical content block pattern (per patient brochure, which is the **reference template for visuals, messaging, and overall tone of ALL LISRAYA materials**).

rules.intent: Align layout and text presentation with the reference patient brochure for consistent messaging flow.
rules.rule_text: Use the canonical layout structure for patient-facing content blocks: a bold headline, followed by simple benefit statements, and ending with a patient quote.
